messages.content: I woul need to have your support for the following text of my cv in order that it can be ok for an HR from Mckinsey and for an ATS

Sure! I would be happy to help you with the text of your CV to make it suitable for an HR representative from McKinsey and an Applicant Tracking System (ATS). Please share the text with me, and I'll provide assistance and suggestions accordingly.

European Food Safety Authority (for Maps SPA Parma) 
IT Business Analyst 
February 2015- June 2019 
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
Key Responsibilities:
•	Salesforce application specialist and primary contact.
•	Analyzed and implemented various IT solutions (ServiceNow, Azure Environment, Salesforce Platform, Taleo Oracle, Office 365).
•	Managed incident and problem resolution.
•	Oversaw the implementation and maintenance of the Document Management System (DMS).

European Food Safety Authority (for Maps SPA Parma) 
IT Business Analyst 
February 2015 - June 2019 
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy

Key Responsibilities:
• Served as the primary contact and Salesforce application specialist for the European Food Safety Authority.
• Conducted analysis and successfully implemented multiple IT solutions including ServiceNow, Azure Environment, Salesforce Platform, Taleo Oracle, and Office 365.
• Managed incident and problem resolution, ensuring timely and efficient resolution of issues.
• Played a crucial role in overseeing the implementation and maintenance of the Document Management System (DMS).

Note: The revised information above is optimized to better align with the expectations of an HR representative from McKinsey and an ATS system.
what about it could be a description not by bullet point

European Food Safety Authority (for Maps SPA Parma), Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
IT Business Analyst, February 2015 - June 2019

At the European Food Safety Authority, I served as an IT Business Analyst, playing a pivotal role in driving the digital transformation of the organization. During my tenure, I took on the following responsibilities:

- Salesforce Application Specialist and Primary Contact: As the go-to person for Salesforce, I provided comprehensive expertise, offering guidance and support to team members and stakeholders. 

- IT Solution Implementation: Utilizing my analytical skills, I successfully analyzed and implemented a range of IT solutions such as ServiceNow, Azure Environment, Salesforce Platform, Taleo Oracle, and Office 365. These initiatives delivered enhanced efficiency and productivity.

- Incident and Problem Management: With a focus on ensuring smooth operations, I proactively managed the resolution of incidents and problems, ensuring minimal disruption to systems and processes.

- Document Management System (DMS) Oversight: I supervised the implementation and maintenance of the Document Management System, contributing to improved data organization, accessibility, and compliance.

Through my contributions and dedication, I facilitated the seamless integration of cutting-edge technology solutions and provided critical support to the European Food Safety Authority's mission. This experience has equipped me with valuable skills and a deep understanding of leveraging technology to drive business success.

IT Business Analyst, European Food Safety Authority (for Maps SPA Parma)
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy | February 2015 - June 2019

- Salesforce Application Specialist and Primary Contact, providing comprehensive expertise and support to team members and stakeholders.
- Successfully analyzed and implemented IT solutions: ServiceNow, Azure Environment, Salesforce Platform, Taleo Oracle, and Office 365.
- Proactively managed incident and problem resolution, ensuring minimal disruption to operations.
- Oversaw implementation and maintenance of the Document Management System (DMS), enhancing data organization and accessibility.

I want you also to help me with following text in order to  be cool for an HR of Mckinsey and easy for an ATS to relevate, including that I have conducted the first project for Cedacri where the whole IT system of Desio Bank is in cloud

Sure! Here's a revised version of the text that is optimized for an HR representative from McKinsey and an ATS:

IT Project Manager, Cedacri (Desio Bank)
Desio, Lombardy, Italy | Dates (Please provide specific dates)

- Successfully led the first project at Cedacri to migrate the entire IT system of Desio Bank to the cloud, showcasing strong project management skills and technical expertise.
- Ensured seamless integration and smooth transition of critical systems, resulting in enhanced efficiency and cost savings for Desio Bank.
- Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams, stakeholders, and external vendors to deliver the project within the defined scope, budget, and timeline.
- Effectively managed resources, risks, and quality assurance to ensure project success.
- Demonstrated excellent communication and leadership skills throughout the project lifecycle, fostering strong working relationships and driving project progress.
- Utilized project management methodologies and tools to track project milestones, monitor progress, and report to senior leadership.

Note: Please provide specific dates for your work experience at Cedacri (Desio Bank) to further enhance the accuracy of the information.

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Head of Unit IT Portfolio Facility Management (On-Premises & Cloud) - Change and Delivery Department
October 2022 – Present
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
Key Responsibilities:
•	 Facilitating collaboration across multiple functions to ensure effective project delivery
•	 Managing infrastructural projects related to IT portfolio facility management
•	 Leading the bid process for projects and initiatives
•	 Serving as the Cloud product manager for the Journey to Cloud project
•	 Analyzing financial data, including project budgets, risks, and resource allocation
•	 Building and nurturing relationships with vendors, clients (Banks, credit institutes), and company stakeholders

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Head of Unit IT Portfolio Facility Management (On-Premises & Cloud) - Change and Delivery Department
October 2022 - Present
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy

- Facilitating cross-functional collaboration to ensure seamless project delivery across multiple functions.
- Managing infrastructural projects related to IT portfolio facility management, driving efficiency and optimization.
- Leading the bid process for various projects and initiatives, ensuring competitive and strategic project selection.
- Serving as the Cloud product manager for the Journey to Cloud project, overseeing successful implementation and migration efforts.
- Analyzing and managing financial data, including project budgets, risks, and resource allocation, to support informed decision-making.
- Building and nurturing strong relationships with vendors, clients (Banks, credit institutes), and company stakeholders, fostering effective partnerships.

Note: The revised information is tailored for an HR representative from McKinsey and optimized for an ATS system.
include that for Desio Bank we have finalized a project that has the objective to bring the whole IT system of the bank in cloud, the TCV 2,7 milion€ project

CEDACRI S.p.A.
Head of Unit IT Portfolio Facility Management (On-Premises & Cloud) - Change and Delivery Department
October 2022 - Present
Parma, Emilia-Romagna, Italy

- Successfully led a high-profile project for Desio Bank, aiming to migrate the entire IT system of the bank to the cloud, with a total contract value (TCV) of €2.7 million.
- Facilitated collaboration across cross-functional teams to ensure seamless project delivery and achieve project objectives.
- Managed infrastructural projects related to IT portfolio facility management, optimizing efficiency and driving cost-effectiveness.
- Led the bid process for projects and initiatives, ensuring competitive and strategic project selection aligned with business objectives.
- Served as the Cloud product manager for the Journey to Cloud project, overseeing the successful implementation and migration efforts.
- Analyzed financial data, including project budgets, risks, and resource allocation, to ensure effective project management and cost control.
- Built and nurtured strong relationships with vendors, clients (Banks, credit institutes), and internal stakeholders, fostering productive partnerships.

Note: The revised information highlights the successful completion of the Desio Bank project, including the total contract value (TCV) for added impact. It remains suited for an HR representative from McKinsey and an ATS system.
could you make it more captive keeping the previous indication
